Dubai crypto market hits 50 licensed firms after new VARA approval
news.summary: Dubai’s VARA has licensed its 50th crypto firm, though only 39 VASPs were fully operational at the end of 2025 as the emirate’s regulated market continues to expand.

news.title: Pioneering zk-rollup Loopring closes DEX, citing lack of adoption
news.summary: “We lacked a virtual machine, no composability, no real‑world payment use cases. That limitation kept our ecosystem from growing,” said the team.
